title: strip spaces
text: strip spaces Strip trailing spaces off char field values returned by the sql ProcScript statement. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = strip spaces Use Use this option if you encounter problems with trailing spaces returned by sql when migrating from the Sybase U2 connector to the current connector. Description Uniface returns the data it gets from Sybase, which may contain trailing spaces. Older versions of Sybase strip trailing spaces, but the current version does not always do that.
